zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Umfreville於大約1269年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根馬可時，他的父親John de Umfreville36歲，母親Alice de Lanherne28歲。他和Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville至少有1個兒子。他去世於1346年之前在英國戴文易亞斯特 唐，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文托林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Umfreville于大约1269年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根馬可时，他的父亲John de Umfreville36岁，母亲Alice de Lanherne28岁。他和Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville至少有1个儿子。他去世于1346年之前在英国戴文易亞斯特 唐，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文托林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Umfreville was born about 1269, in Penmark, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John de Umfreville, was 36 and his mother, Alice de Lanherne, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville. He died before 1346, in East Down, Devon, England, and was buried in Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Umfreville est né environ 1269, à Penmark, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Umfreville, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lanherne, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville. Il est décédé avant 1346, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Umfreville um 1269 in Penmark, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Umfreville 36 und seine Mutter Alice de Lanherne 28. Er hatte mit Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 1346 in East Down, Devon, England und wurde in Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Umfreville è nato il circa 1269 nel Penmark, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Umfreville, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Lanherne, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville. Morì prima del 1346, nel East Down, Devon, England, e fu sepolto a Torrington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Umfrevilleが約1269年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンペンマークで生まれた時，父John de Umfrevilleは36歳，母Alice de Lanherneは28歳であった。彼はMrs Gilbert De Umfrevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1346年以前にイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンで死去し，イギリスイギリスデボントリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Umfreville(이)가 대략 1269년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 펜마크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Umfreville(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Lanherne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 이전 영국 데폰 이스트 다운에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Umfreville nasceu aproximadamente 1269, em Penmark, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Umfreville, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lanherne, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville. Ele faleceu antes 1346, em East Down, Devon, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Torrington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Umfreville родился около 1269 г. в местности пенмарк, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Umfreville было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lanherne, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Gilbert De Umfreville. Он умер перед 1346 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия и был похоронен в местности торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
